title: DVSA Freedom of Information (FOI) disclosure logs, 2025
body: "These monthly logs show FOI requests that DVSA responded to each month.  The logs show FOI requests that were either:   fully successful - where DVSA supplied all the information that was asked for partially successful - where DVSA could only supply part of the information that was asked for   The logs do not show FOI requests where:    DVSA did not hold any of the information that was asked for it would have cost too much or taken too much staff time to deal with the request the request was vexatious the request repeated a previous request from the same person the information that was asked for was exempt from the Freedom of Information Act   The Information Commissioner’s Office has information about what to expect after making an FOI request, including when a request can be refused.  Request a copy of a response  DVSA holds copies of responses for 2 years from the date they are sent.  Email DVSA if you want a copy of a response. You need to give the reference number of the request.   DVSA FOI team foi@dvsa.gov.uk   "
